apps.name: HabitHero
apps.shortDescription: Android-first habit tracker with intuitive calendar view, streaks, and smart reminders.
apps.description: HabitHero is a focused habit-tracking app designed for Android users who want a clear visual overview of their routines. The app features a detailed Calendar view so you can see your progress at a glance, along with streak tracking, customizable reminders, and gentle nudges when you fall behind. Data is backed up with optional Cloud sync so you can keep your habits safe across devices.

apps.name: FocusStreaks
apps.shortDescription: Multi-platform habit and routine tracker with powerful analytics.
apps.description: FocusStreaks helps you build consistent routines with flexible schedules, tags, and detailed habit analytics. Track habits across Android and iOS with automatic Cloud sync and export options. Ideal for users who want deeper insights into their productivity trends.

apps.name: TaskFlow
apps.shortDescription: Smart to-do list and project planner for individuals and teams.
apps.description: TaskFlow combines personal task management with lightweight project planning. Create lists, assign due dates, and collaborate with teammates in shared workspaces. With Android and iOS apps plus a web dashboard, TaskFlow keeps your work organized everywhere.

apps.name: NoteMaster
apps.shortDescription: Cross-platform notes app with powerful sync across devices and offline access.
apps.description: NoteMaster is a fast, flexible notes app for Android, iOS, and iPad. Capture notes, checklists, and attachments, then access them anywhere with reliable Cloud sync. Work offline on your phone or tablet and everything automatically syncs when you reconnect. Ideal for students and professionals who switch between devices all day.

apps.name: CloudLists
apps.shortDescription: Lightweight to-do lists with offline access and secure Cloud sync.
apps.description: CloudLists keeps your shopping lists, chores, and quick to-dos perfectly in sync across your devices. It works reliably offline and updates in the background when your connection returns, so you never lose an item.

apps.name: BudgetWise
apps.shortDescription: Simple budgeting app with offline mode and multi-device Cloud sync.
apps.description: BudgetWise helps you track expenses, set savings goals, and view insights about your spending. Access your data offline while traveling and let Cloud sync update your other devices once you're back online.

apps.name: FocusTimer
apps.shortDescription: Free Pomodoro timer to help you stay focused during deep work sessions.
apps.description: FocusTimer uses the classic Pomodoro technique to keep you productive. Customize session lengths, track your completed focus blocks, and review your daily focus summary. Works entirely offline.

apps.name: SecureChat+
apps.shortDescription: Cross-platform messenger with end-to-end encryption and group chats.
apps.description: SecureChat+ is a privacy-focused messenger for Android and iOS. All messages and calls are protected with End-to-end encryption by default, and your chat history is securely synced across devices. Supports Android 8.0 or later and iOS 13 or later, with optional desktop companion apps.

apps.name: WhisperLine
apps.shortDescription: Affordable encrypted messenger for Android and iOS with self-destructing messages.
apps.description: WhisperLine offers secure one-on-one and group messaging with End-to-end encryption and support for Android 8.0 or later and iOS 13 or later. With a low monthly price and a 14-day free trial, it’s an easy way to protect your conversations without breaking the bank.

apps.name: MeetCircle
apps.shortDescription: Group chat and communities for friends, clubs, and small teams.
apps.description: MeetCircle makes it easy to organize group chats around topics and interests. Create invite-only circles, schedule events, and share media. Messages sync across mobile and web apps.

apps.name: PhotoCraft Pro
apps.shortDescription: Professional photo editor for iPad with layers, RAW support, and one-time purchase.
apps.description: PhotoCraft Pro brings desktop-grade photo editing tools to your iPad. Work with layers, masks, advanced color grading, and RAW files, all in an interface optimized for Apple Pencil. Pay once with a one-time purchase—no subscription required.

apps.name: Lumena Studio
apps.shortDescription: Advanced photo and video editing suite for iPad and iPhone.
apps.description: Lumena Studio offers a complete toolkit for serious creators, including multi-track video editing and professional photo tools in a single app. Available as a one-time purchase with optional add-ons.

apps.name: ClipMerge Video Editor
apps.shortDescription: User-friendly video editor for quick clips, stories, and social posts.
apps.description: ClipMerge Video Editor helps you trim, merge, and caption videos in minutes. Add transitions, filters, and music optimized for social platforms. Sync projects to the Cloud so you can edit on multiple devices.

apps.name: DocuScan Vault
apps.shortDescription: Secure document scanner with encrypted Cloud storage.
apps.description: DocuScan Vault turns your phone into a secure document scanner. Scan receipts, contracts, and IDs, then store them with End-to-end encryption in the Cloud. Access your files offline and they’ll sync once you’re back online.

apps.name: SyncVault Backup
apps.shortDescription: Automatic photo and file backup with offline restore.
apps.description: SyncVault Backup protects your photos and important files with automatic, encrypted backups. Restore your content even when offline, and let the app reconcile changes when you reconnect.

faq_articles.title: Cancel your iOS subscription within 7 days
faq_articles.excerpt: Learn how to cancel your iOS subscription within 7 days of purchase and when you may be eligible for a refund.
faq_articles.body:
## Overview

You can cancel your iOS subscription at any time from your iPhone or iPad. If you cancel within 7 days of your initial purchase or renewal, you may be eligible for a refund depending on your region and the applicable store policies.

## How to cancel your iOS subscription

1. Open the **Settings** app on your iPhone or iPad.
2. Tap your name at the top, then tap **Subscriptions**.
3. Locate the app subscription (for example, *NoteMaster* or *TaskFlow*).
4. Tap the subscription, then tap **Cancel Subscription** and confirm.

Your subscription will remain active until the end of the current billing period, unless Apple confirms an immediate cancellation and refund.

## Within 7 days of purchase

If you cancel **within 7 days** of your purchase or renewal date, you can request a refund review. Apple processes payments for iOS subscriptions, but our team can help you understand your options.

When contacting us, include:
- The Apple ID used for the purchase
- The app name (for example, *NoteMaster* or *HabitHero*)
- The approximate purchase date
- A short description mentioning that you cancelled within 7 days

## Refunds

Refund decisions for iOS purchases are ultimately handled by Apple. However, we can provide documentation and confirm your subscription status on our side.

To start the process, first submit a refund request through Apple:

1. Visit **reportaproblem.apple.com** and sign in with your Apple ID.
2. Select the subscription you wish to request a refund for.
3. Choose a reason and submit the request.

After submitting the request to Apple, you can also reach out to our support team so we can review your account in parallel.

At the bottom of this article, use the **Contact support about refunds** button to send us your details. A support specialist will follow up with you by email.

faq_articles.title: Manage your Android subscriptions
faq_articles.excerpt: Find, change, or cancel app subscriptions purchased through Google Play.
faq_articles.body:
## Where to find your Android subscriptions

Most Android subscriptions for our apps, including HabitHero and TaskFlow, are managed directly through **Google Play**.

To view them:
1. Open the **Google Play Store** app.
2. Tap your profile picture > **Payments & subscriptions**.
3. Tap **Subscriptions**.

## Change plans or cancel

From the subscription screen you can:
- Upgrade or downgrade between available plans
- Update your payment method
- Cancel your subscription

Changes usually take effect at the next billing date.

## After cancellation

After you cancel, your subscription will stay active until the end of the paid period. You can resubscribe at any time from the same screen.

faq_articles.title: Why was I charged twice for my subscription?
faq_articles.excerpt: Understand common reasons for seeing two charges and how to fix a double charge on your account.
faq_articles.body:
## Overview

If you believe you were **double-charged for your monthly subscription**, there are a few common explanations and steps you can take to resolve the issue.

## Common reasons for two charges

1. **Overlapping subscriptions** on different platforms (for example, one via Google Play and one via the App Store).
2. **Multiple accounts** using the same payment method.
3. **Pending authorizations** that appear as duplicate charges but disappear after a few days.

## What to check first

- Confirm which store (Google Play, App Store, or our website) each charge came from.
- Make sure you are signed in with the correct Google or Apple account.
- Review your email receipts for duplicate purchases.

## Getting help

If you still see two settled charges for the same period, contact us with:
- A brief description including the phrase “double-charged for my monthly subscription”
- Screenshots of both charges
- The email addresses or IDs associated with each store account

Our billing team will investigate and help you secure a refund where appropriate.

faq_articles.title: Update your payment method
faq_articles.excerpt: How to update your card or payment details for subscriptions.
faq_articles.body:
## Where you pay determines how you update

The steps to update your payment method depend on where you started your subscription:

- **Google Play** (Android)
- **App Store** (iOS / iPadOS)
- **Website checkout** (credit card or PayPal)

## Google Play

1. Open **Google Play Store**.
2. Tap your profile icon > **Payments & subscriptions** > **Payment methods**.
3. Add or edit your card details.

## App Store (iOS)

1. Open **Settings** on your device.
2. Tap your name > **Payment & Shipping**.
3. Add or update your card information.

## Website purchases

If you subscribed directly on our website (for example to use NoteMaster across iOS + Android), you can update your card from the **Billing** section in your account dashboard.

faq_articles.title: Refund policy for subscriptions and one-time purchases
faq_articles.excerpt: Learn when you can request a refund for subscriptions, one-time purchases, and in-app upgrades.
faq_articles.body:
## Subscriptions

For subscriptions like HabitHero, TaskFlow, or SecureChat+, refunds are generally offered when:
- There is a verified technical issue we cannot resolve.
- You were charged after cancelling on time.

For iOS subscriptions, Apple typically processes refunds directly. For Android and web subscriptions, our billing team can assist you.

## One-time purchases

For one-time apps such as PhotoCraft Pro, we may offer a refund within a limited period (usually 14 days) if you experience unresolved technical issues and have not heavily used the product (for example, exporting dozens of projects).

## How to request a refund

1. Gather your purchase receipt.
2. Note the app name and platform.
3. Contact support from the **Contact Support** page and select **Billing & Payments** as the issue type.

Include as much detail as possible so our team can review your case quickly.

faq_articles.title: Fix sync issues across devices
faq_articles.excerpt: Troubleshoot common sync problems for apps like NoteMaster, CloudLists, and BudgetWise.
faq_articles.body:
## Check your connection

First, make sure each device has a stable internet connection. Many of our apps, including NoteMaster and CloudLists, support offline access and Cloud sync. Changes made offline should sync automatically once your device reconnects.

## Make sure you are signed in to the same account

Confirm that you’re using the same email or account ID on all devices. If the accounts differ, your data will not sync.

## Force a manual sync

Most apps have a **Sync now** option in Settings. Use this to trigger a sync if automatic sync appears delayed.

## Reinstalling the app

As a last resort, sign out, reinstall the app, and sign back in. This will force a full sync from the server, but may take a few minutes depending on your data size.

faq_articles.title: How offline access works in our apps
faq_articles.excerpt: Understand what you can do without an internet connection and how data syncs later.
faq_articles.body:
## What you can do offline

Apps like HabitHero, NoteMaster, CloudLists, BudgetWise, and PhotoCraft Pro support offline access. You can:
- View and edit existing data
- Create new notes, tasks, or projects
- Capture photos and scans

## When does Cloud sync happen?

Changes made offline are saved locally and automatically pushed to the Cloud when you next connect to the internet. You don't need to press a button, but some apps also offer a **Sync now** action.

## Conflict resolution

If you change the same item on two devices while offline, the most recent edit usually wins. When possible, the app will show a conflict dialog so you can choose which version to keep.

faq_articles.title: Security and encryption in SecureChat+ and WhisperLine
faq_articles.excerpt: Learn how End-to-end encryption protects your messages in our communication apps.
faq_articles.body:
## End-to-end encryption

Both SecureChat+ and WhisperLine use End-to-end encryption for private and group chats. This means messages are encrypted on your device and can only be decrypted on the recipient’s devices.

## Supported platforms

- Android 8.0 or later
- iOS 13 or later

## Backups and Cloud sync

Even when messages are synced across devices, they remain encrypted. Some metadata (such as last-seen status) may be stored without End-to-end encryption, but message contents and attachments are fully protected.

faq_articles.title: Create an account and sign in
faq_articles.excerpt: Set up your account to sync data across devices and access subscriptions.
faq_articles.body:
## Why create an account?

An account lets you sync data between devices, manage subscriptions in one place, and contact support more easily.

## Creating an account

1. Open any supported app, such as NoteMaster or CloudLists.
2. Go to **Settings > Account**.
3. Tap **Create account** and follow the prompts.

## Signing in on another device

Install the same app on your second device and sign in with the same email address. Your data will appear after it finishes syncing.

faq_articles.title: Reset your password
faq_articles.excerpt: Follow these steps if you forgot your password or need to reset it.
faq_articles.body:
## Reset from the app

1. On the sign-in screen, tap **Forgot password?**.
2. Enter the email address associated with your account.
3. Check your inbox for a password reset email and follow the link.

## Reset from the website

You can also start a reset from the **Sign In** page on our website. Use the same email you use in the apps.

If you no longer have access to your email, contact support and be prepared to verify your identity.

faq_articles.title: How to contact support
faq_articles.excerpt: Learn the best ways to reach our support team for technical, billing, or account issues.
faq_articles.body:
## Contact form

The quickest way to reach us is through the **Contact Support** form on our website. Choose the app (for example, TaskFlow or NoteMaster), pick an issue type like **Billing & Payments**, set a priority, and describe your issue.

## Email

You can also reply directly to any email you've received from our support team to continue an existing conversation.

## Response times

We aim to respond to high-priority billing issues within 4 business hours and other issues within 1 business day.

tutorials.description: Learn the basics of setting up NoteMaster on iOS so your notes stay synced across devices using a single account.

subscription_plans.name: Single Device Basic
subscription_plans.description: Entry-level plan for individual users who only need to use the apps on a single phone or tablet.

subscription_plans.name: Mobile Essentials (3 devices)
subscription_plans.description: Best for individuals or small families who want full access on up to three devices across iOS and Android.

subscription_plans.name: Household Plus (5 devices)
subscription_plans.description: Share access with your entire household on phones and tablets, including iPad support for creative and productivity apps.

subscription_plans.name: Pro Team (10 devices)
subscription_plans.description: Designed for small teams that need secure access across multiple phones and tablets with priority support.

subscription_plans.name: Euro Family (3 devices)
subscription_plans.description: A family-friendly plan for customers billed in euros, with support for iPhone and iPad on up to three devices.
